tasks.label: Collect
tasks.command: conda run -n ACMERealWorldFS --live-stream env LD_LIBRARY_PATH=/home/rvl_root/anaconda3/envs/ACMERealWorld/lib python -u -m client.collect task=${fileBasenameNoExtension}

tasks.label: Eval
tasks.command: conda run -n ACMERealWorldFS --live-stream env LD_LIBRARY_PATH=/home/rvl_root/anaconda3/envs/ACMERealWorld/lib python -u -m client.eval task=${fileBasenameNoExtension}

tasks.label: Postprocess
tasks.command: conda run -n ACMERealWorld --live-stream env PYTHONPATH="${workspaceFolder}:${workspaceFolder}/submodules/FoundationStereo" python -u client/postprocess.py

tasks.label: Sync Episodes to Borabora
tasks.command: LOG=/home/james/sync_${input:remotePath}_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S).log; EXCLUDES=$(ssh -p 2233 -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 -J james@142.1.44.183:2233 james@142.1.46.125 'for d in /home/james/ACME/data/${input:remotePath}/*/; do [ -f "$d/COMPLETE" ] && printf -- " --exclude=%s" "$(basename "$d")"; done' 2>/dev/null); setsid -f rsync -av --partial --progress $EXCLUDES -e 'ssh -p 2233 -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 -J james@142.1.44.183:2233' /mnt/ssd/james/episodes/ james@142.1.46.125:/home/james/ACME/data/${input:remotePath} > $LOG 2>&1 < /dev/null; echo "tail -f $LOG"
